concerns.summary: RESOLVED 2026-06-08 by bubbles.validate (delivery-validation pass). specs/056-twitter-api-connector/report.md previously (2026-05-27) falsely claimed 'App-Only bearer + User-Context PKCE' was delivered when PKCE was unimplemented; that was corrected to honest 'App-Only only' on 2026-06-07. Now that PKCE has GENUINELY shipped (Path A, all 4 scopes green), the closure owner bubbles.validate rewrote the parent report.md Summary to the truthful both-tiers statement and marked GAP-056-G1/G2 RESOLVED (no overclaim: live real-Twitter arm stays operator-gated). Parent top-level status stays done; certification structure unchanged; spec.md/design.md/scopes.md untouched.

NON-BLOCKING stabilize-pass observation (bubbles.stabilize, 2026-06-08; single-operator-acceptable, NOT a finding). twitter_oauth_states abandoned rows (authorize-begin without a matching finalize) are not swept by a background job; the model is expiry-checked-on-read and fail-safe — an expired row can never be consumed (oauth_store.go:230 rejects it) — and for the single-operator default owner the abandoned-row volume is negligible. The existing idx_twitter_oauth_states_expires_at index (migration:46) makes a periodic DELETE ... WHERE expires_at < now() sweep trivial IF a multi-account/multi-tenant owner is ever introduced. No change made (anti-gold-plating). Evidence: report.md -> 'Stabilize Pass — BUG-056-002 (2026-06-08)' -> ST-OBS-1.

NON-BLOCKING security-pass observation (bubbles.security, 2026-06-08; single-operator-acceptable, NOT a finding). AuthorizeService.Finalize persists via SaveTokens(ctx, s.owner, tok) using the finalize invocation's --user-id rather than the consumed state row's OwnerUserID. In the single-operator CLI model this is not an access-control boundary crossing: the 256-bit CSPRNG state_token is an unguessable capability only the flow's operator holds, begin and finalize default to the same DefaultOwnerUserID, and production routing reads under that same owner. IF a true multi-tenant owner model is ever introduced, Finalize SHOULD additionally assert st.OwnerUserID == s.owner before persisting. No change made now (anti-gold-plating; consistent with ST-OBS-1's single-operator scope). Evidence: report.md -> 'Security Scan — BUG-056-002 OWASP (2026-06-08)' -> SEC-OBS-1.
